creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Committed, thanks!  By the way, I removed patch-aa altogether, 
the change from ${PREFIX} to ${X11BASE} is meaningless since they 
are the same if USE_X11 is defined.  Also, I changed "PREFIX=" to 
"PREFIX?=" in Makefile.config, it is passed in from the environment 
during a regular build so "?=" would suffice (for people who are 
debugging the port and types "make" inside the work directory, for
